sigWerErrors.reason: '还' (still/yet) and '黑' (black) are completely different in meaning and context, which changes the meaning of the sentence.

'址' (address) and '日' (day/sun) are unrelated, which makes the phrase '地址' (address) incorrect and incoherent.
